titulo: Si no lo haces, se te caera
titulo_english: If you don't, it will fall off.
synopsis:
Eunsung and Sora are old childhood friends. They're trapped in a room and are only allowed to leave if they have sex. However, another stipulation has complicated things further. If they don't do it within three hours, Eunsung's weiner will snap off! Will these lifelong friends bite the bullet and do the deed to break out or will Eunsung lose his schlong forever?

(Source: Lezhin Entertainment)
background: Sexcape Room: Snap Off was published digitally in English by Lezhin Entertainment on July 8, 2023.
